tasks.sql: SELECT SUM(PNL_SUM) AS total_pnl FROM client_product WHERE TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') = DATE '2024-03-01'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT INN) FROM client_product
SELECT SEG, AVG(CA_LCY_SUM) AS avg_ca_lcy_sum FROM client_product WHERE TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2024-01-01' AND DATE '2024-03-01' GROUP BY SEG ORDER BY avg_ca_lcy_sum DESC

SELECT TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT INN) AS new_clients
FROM client_product
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CREATE_DT) = 2024
  AND CREATE_DT IS NOT NULL
  AND TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') >= DATE '2024-01-01'
  AND TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') < DATE '2025-01-01'
GROUP BY TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM')
ORDER BY month

SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2024-10-01' AND DATE '2024-12-01' THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) AS q4_pnl,
  SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2024-07-01' AND DATE '2024-09-01' THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) AS q3_pnl,
  SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2024-10-01' AND DATE '2024-12-01' THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) - 
  SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2024-07-01' AND DATE '2024-09-01' THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) AS diff,
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2024-07-01' AND DATE '2024-09-01' THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE (SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2024-10-01' AND DATE '2024-12-01' THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) - 
          SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2024-07-01' AND DATE '2024-09-01' THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END)) / 
         SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2024-07-01' AND DATE '2024-09-01' THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) * 100 
  END AS pct_change
FROM client_product
WHERE TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2024-07-01' AND DATE '2024-12-01'

SELECT 
  SUM(PL_CA) AS pl_ca,
  SUM(PL_DEP) AS pl_dep,
  SUM(PL_VK) AS pl_vk_in,
  SUM(PL_VK_OUT) AS pl_vk_out,
  SUM(FX_MARGIN_RUB) AS fx_margin_rub,
  SUM(VED_SUM) AS ved_sum,
  SUM(PNL_SUM) - (SUM(PL_CA) + SUM(PL_DEP) + SUM(PL_VK) + SUM(PL_VK_OUT) + SUM(VED_SUM) + SUM(FX_MARGIN_RUB)) AS other_income
FROM client_product
WHERE TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2024-01-01' AND DATE '2024-03-01'

SELECT INN, 
       SUM(PNL_SUM) AS total_pnl,
       SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') = DATE '2024-01-01' THEN FX_VOLUME_RUB ELSE 0 END) AS fx_jan,
       SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') = DATE '2024-02-01' THEN FX_VOLUME_RUB ELSE 0 END) AS fx_feb,
       SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') = DATE '2024-03-01' THEN FX_VOLUME_RUB ELSE 0 END) AS fx_mar
FROM client_product
WHERE TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2024-01-01' AND DATE '2024-03-01'
GROUP BY INN
ORDER BY total_pnl DESC
FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY

SELECT DISTINCT cp1.INN
FROM client_product cp1
WHERE TRUNC(cp1.MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2025-10-01' AND DATE '2025-12-01'
  AND cp1.VED_VOL = 0
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM client_product cp2
    WHERE cp2.INN = cp1.INN
      AND TRUNC(cp2.MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2025-07-01' AND DATE '2025-09-01'
      AND cp2.VED_VOL > 0
  )
SELECT SUM(PNL_SUM) AS total_pnl FROM client_product WHERE TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')

SELECT SEG,
       AVG(PNL_SUM) AS avg_pnl,
       AVG(CA_LCY_SUM) AS avg_ca_lcy,
       SUM(FX_VOLUME_RUB) AS total_fx_volume
FROM client_product
WHERE TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') BETWEEN DATE '2024-01-01' AND DATE '2024-03-01'
GROUP BY SEG
ORDER BY avg_pnl DESC FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY

SELECT SUM(PNL_SUM) AS total_pnl
FROM client_product
WHERE MONTH_DT >= DATE'2024-03-01' AND MONTH_DT < DATE'2024-04-01'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT INN) AS total_clients
FROM client_product

SELECT SEG,
       AVG(CA_LCY_SUM) AS avg_ca_lcy_sum
FROM client_product
WHERE MONTH_DT >= DATE'2024-01-01' AND MONTH_DT < DATE'2024-04-01'
GROUP BY SEG
ORDER BY avg_ca_lcy_sum DESC

SELECT TRUNC(CREATE_DT, 'MM') AS month,
       COUNT(DISTINCT INN) AS new_clients
FROM client_product
WHERE CREATE_DT >= DATE'2024-01-01' AND CREATE_DT < DATE'2025-01-01'
GROUP BY TRUNC(CREATE_DT, 'MM')
ORDER BY month

SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'Q') = TRUNC(DATE'2024-10-01', 'Q') THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) AS pnl_q3,
  SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'Q') = TRUNC(DATE'2024-07-01', 'Q') THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) AS pnl_q4,
  SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'Q') = TRUNC(DATE'2024-10-01', 'Q') THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) - 
  SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'Q') = TRUNC(DATE'2024-07-01', 'Q') THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) AS diff,
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'Q') = TRUNC(DATE'2024-07-01', 'Q') THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE 
      (SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'Q') = TRUNC(DATE'2024-10-01', 'Q') THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) - 
       SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'Q') = TRUNC(DATE'2024-07-01', 'Q') THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END)) / 
      SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'Q') = TRUNC(DATE'2024-07-01', 'Q') THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) * 100
  END AS pct_change
FROM client_product
WHERE MONTH_DT >= DATE'2024-07-01' AND MONTH_DT < DATE'2025-01-01'

SELECT SUM(PL_CA) AS pnl_ca,
       SUM(PL_DEP) AS pnl_dep,
       SUM(PL_VK) AS pnl_vk_own,
       SUM(PL_VK_OUT) AS pnl_vk_other,
       SUM(FX_MARGIN_RUB) AS pnl_fx_margin,
       SUM(VED_SUM) AS pnl_ved,
       SUM(PNL_SUM) - (SUM(PL_CA) + SUM(PL_DEP) + SUM(PL_VK) + SUM(PL_VK_OUT) + SUM(FX_MARGIN_RUB) + SUM(VED_SUM)) AS pnl_other
FROM client_product
WHERE MONTH_DT >= DATE'2024-01-01' AND MONTH_DT < DATE'2024-04-01'

SELECT INN,
       ORGANIZATION_NM,
       SUM(PNL_SUM) AS total_pnl,
       SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') = TRUNC(DATE'2024-01-01', 'MM') THEN FX_VOLUME_RUB ELSE 0 END) AS fx_vol_jan,
       SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') = TRUNC(DATE'2024-02-01', 'MM') THEN FX_VOLUME_RUB ELSE 0 END) AS fx_vol_feb,
       SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(MONTH_DT, 'MM') = TRUNC(DATE'2024-03-01', 'MM') THEN FX_VOLUME_RUB ELSE 0 END) AS fx_vol_mar
FROM client_product
WHERE MONTH_DT >= DATE'2024-01-01' AND MONTH_DT < DATE'2024-04-01'
GROUP BY INN, ORGANIZATION_NM
ORDER BY total_pnl DESC
FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY

SELECT DISTINCT c1.INN
FROM client_product c1
WHERE c1.MONTH_DT >= DATE'2025-10-01' AND c1.MONTH_DT < DATE'2026-01-01'
  AND c1.VED_VOL > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM client_product c2
    WHERE c2.INN = c1.INN
      AND c2.MONTH_DT >= DATE'2025-07-01' AND c2.MONTH_DT < DATE'2025-10-01'
      AND c2.VED_VOL > 0
  )

SELECT SUM(PNL_SUM) AS total_pnl
FROM client_product
WHERE MONTH_DT = (SELECT MAX(MONTH_DT) FROM client_product)

SELECT SEG,
       AVG(PNL_SUM) AS avg_pnl,
       AVG(CA_LCY_SUM) AS avg_ca_lcy,
       SUM(FX_VOLUME_RUB) AS total_fx_volume
FROM client_product
WHERE MONTH_DT >= DATE'2024-01-01' AND MONTH_DT < DATE'2024-04-01'
GROUP BY SEG
ORDER BY avg_pnl DESC
